steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which species has the greatest range between its minimum and maximum recorded depths. That means subtract each species' minimum depth from its maximum depth and compare.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘Acropora anthocercis.’: smaller depth spread. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Cyphastrea hexasepta.’: smaller depth spread. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘Agaricia fragilis.’: largest spread between shallowest and deepest recorded depths. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘Heliofungia fralinae.’: smaller depth spread. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
